content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.x_engagement_poster
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/x_engagement_poster.py (1033 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: X Engagement Poster - Mega Thread Generator for Cosmos AI Swarm

Generates massive 20+ post article threads with:
- Trending topic incorporation for algorithm capture
- High-quality AI-generated images per section
- One hashtag per post (strategic, trending-aware)
- No tagging anyone
- Full quantum 

CLASSES:
- ThreadPost: A single post in the mega thread.
- MegaThread: The complete mega thread.
- XEngagementPoster: Mega thread poster for maximum X algorithm engagement.
  Methods: def poster(self)
  Methods: def brain(self)
  Methods: def image_gen(self)
  Methods: def grok(self)
  Methods: async def get_trending_topics(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: async def generate_thread(self, topic: Optional[str]=None, sections: Optional[List[Dict]]=None) -> M
  Methods: async def generate_images(self, thread: MegaThread, max_concurrent: int=3) -> None
  Methods: async def post_thread(self, thread: MegaThread, delay_between_posts: float=3.0) -> MegaThread

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_engagement_poster() -> XEngagementPoster
- async def main()
